title: Senior Embedded Developer till Elvaco
description:
Vi söker nu en Senior Embedded Developer som vill ta en central roll i att bygga nästa generations uppkopplade produkter. Här får du arbeta djupt tekniskt, nära hårdvara, med stort inflytande över arkitektur, säkerhet och systemdesign.
  
Elvaco är ett snabbväxande och innovativt teknikföretag verksamt inom energisektorn. Som en del av Bemsiq Group inom Investment AB Latour bidrar vi till den globala omställningen mot smartare och mer hållbara energilösningar. Med marknadsledande produkter, stark tillväxt och en entreprenöriell kultur erbjuder Elvaco en spännande miljö för dig som vill göra skillnad i en snabbt föränderlig bransch.
  
Häng med och skapa framtiden inom smart mätning!
  
  

Om rollen
  
Vi söker en Senior Embedded Developer som vill ta ägandeskap över hela stacken – från bootloader och Yocto till hur funktionalitet exponeras mot applikationslager.
  
Det här är inte en roll där du “bara kodar” – du bygger system på riktigt.
  
  

**Du kommer att:**  

Ta rå hårdvara → bygga ett stabilt Linux-system (Yocto)
  
Arbeta nära drivrutiner och HW (SPI, I2C, UART m.m.)
  
Designa robust integration mot Java (DBus, sockets, REST)
  
Driva security (Secure Boot, TLS, OTA) – ett prioriterat område
  
  

Du blir den tekniska bryggan mellan hårdvara och applikation, och en nyckelperson i framtida produktplattformar.
  
Vi söker dig som har stark kompetens inom
  
Embedded Linux & Yocto
  
Djup erfarenhet av Yocto / BitBake
  
Bygga, anpassa och felsöka Linux-system
  
Förståelse för bootkedjan (bootloader → kernel → rootfs)
  
  

Hårdvarunära utveckling
  
Stark i C/C++
  
  

**Erfarenhet av:**  

SPI, I2C, UART, GPIO
  
  

**Kunskap om:**  

Device Tree
  
Drivrutiner
  
Van att debugga nära hårdvara
  
  

Integration & systemdesign
  
  

**Exponera funktionalitet via:**  

DBus, sockets, REST, JNI
  
Designa stabila gränssnitt mellan Native och Java
  
  

Cyber Security
  
TLS, certifikat
  
Secure Boot
  
Säker OTA-uppdatering
  
  

**Meriterande:**  

Nyckelhantering
  
Kryptering av data/databaser
  
Säker systemdesign
  
  

Viktiga tekniska områden du kommer jobba med
  
NFC
  
Ethernet
  
Cellular-modem (LTE/4G/5G)
  
Minneshantering
  
  

Vem är du?
  
  

**Du är en senior utvecklare som:**  

Är van att arbeta “underifrån” – nära hårdvara
  
Har byggt system, inte bara komponenter
  
Gillar att lösa komplexa problem
  
Har ett starkt tekniskt driv och tar ansvar för helheten
  
  

Det är viktigt att du behärskar engelska både muntligt och skriftligt.
  
Vi tycker det är viktigt att du är
  
En lagspelare.
  
En person som gärna delar med sig av sin kunskap till kollegor och bidrar till att utveckla deras kompetens.
  
Driven och tycker om att få saker att hända samt driva utvecklingen framåt.
  
Nyfiken på att lära dig nya saker och tycker om att lösa problem.
  
Bra på att prioritera vad som är viktigast.
  
  

Praktisk information
  
**Start:** Omgående
  
**Plats:** Kungsbacka
  
**Anställningsform:** Heltid och fast anställning
  
  

Varför välja Elvaco?
  
Bli en del av ett värderingsdrivet företag som formar framtiden inom energieffektivitet och hållbarhet
  
Arbeta i en engagerad, innovativ och samarbetsinriktad kultur
  
Bli en del av en stark ägarstruktur med långsiktighet och stabilitet
  
Friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 kr och möjlighet att träna 1 h/vecka på arbetstid
  
Fina lokaler och flera årliga tillställningar för att stärka företagskultur och kompetens i bolaget
  
  

Elvacos värderingar
  
Vi sätter kunden i fokus och är enkla att göra affärer med
  
Vi är innovativa och strävar alltid efter att hitta den bästa lösningen för våra kunder
  
Vi är effektiva i allt vi gör för att minimera resursanvändning
  
Vi är pålitliga – vi finns här idag och i framtiden
  
  

ELVACO
  
Är du redo att bli en del av en branschledare med mer än 40 års erfarenhet?
  
Vi är Elvaco, ett svenskt företag specialiserat på produkter och tjänster inom Smart Metering, känt för våra högkvalitativa lösningar. Vår globala närvaro omfattar företag inom fjärrvärme, vatten, fastigheter, el och gas.
  
På Elvaco är vi mer än bara ett teknikföretag – vi är teknikagnostiker med ett tydligt uppdrag. Vi brinner för öppna mätstandarder och är stolta över att leverera innovativa och tillförlitliga lösningar som ger våra användare kontroll över sin energidata.
  
Våra partners, både lokala och globala, litar på att vi levererar kvalitet – och våra slutkunder, såsom energibolag och fastighetsbolag, förlitar sig på oss för att forma en hållbar framtid.
  
Med huvudkontor i Kungsbacka, kontor i Ansbach, Tyskland, och som en del av Bemsiq Group – helägt av Investment AB Latour, ett bolag noterat på Nasdaq OMX med ett börsvärde på cirka 12 miljarder euro – har vi goda förutsättningar för fortsatt innovation och tillväxt.
  
Bli en del av vårt team med över 70 medarbetare i Skandinavien och Europa – och låt oss tillsammans forma framtiden inom smart mätning.
  
  

**Läs mer om Elvaco här:**  

https://www.elvaco.com/
  
I denna rekrytering samarbetar Elvaco med Emajsi.
  
Vid frågor, kontakta Johanna Haraldsson, johanna.haraldsson@elvaco.se, +46 70 995 05 95.
  
Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**Expleo** 
 is seeking a highly skilled and experienced
 **Fullstack Developer** 
 to join our team in
 **Sweden** 
 (located in Gothenburg OR Stockholm).
   

  

 Our
 **ideal** 
 candidate has an always-on mindset with a strong background in designing, configuring, and managing solutions for devices, tools, and applications in a factory/corporate setting.
   

  

 If you are a full-stack engineer looking to expand your skill set, we'd love to hear from you. Join our team today and take the next step in your career!
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Understand and reflect on the customer needs to bring value to the organization.
* Take part in the development cycle using innovative technologies and frameworks.
* Secure qualitative, efficient and performance deliveries.
* Provide input for the design and construction of test cases and scenarios and help validate executed test results.
* Contribute to boosting the team to continually increase knowledge, competence, performance, and innovation
* Collaborate with suppliers, architects, engineers, developers, and internal stakeholders on upcoming and innovative technologies and standardization.
* Collaborate with the local IT site teams for problem/opportunity analysis.


**Qualifications**
* Hold a bachelor’s degree in information technology, Computer Science or equivalent experience in a relevant field.
* Knowledge and experience in agile development practices, ITIL (incident, problem & change process), collaboration tools (such as Azure DevOps or similar)
* Java development & support, relational databases (Oracle, SQL server, My SQL).
* Eager to learn and grow (yourself and the company) using a modern approach to Software Engineering.
* Ability to work under rapidly changing conditions and have the capability to identify, mitigate and decide on solutions when facing obstacles.
* You are fluent in English, both verbally and written.
* You should have a general understanding of production processes and understand how all these things work together to make end user applications work well.
* Knowledge of the automotive industry is meritorious.


**Experience**
* Knowledge about databases (MS SQL (Azure))
* Development platforms (Java, OpenShift, ...)
* Azure Cloud (App services, AKS Azure Kubernetes Cluster)
* SQL server for database
* Azure Storage, Azure Container Services
* Frameworks (Spring, Springboot, WebFlux, ...)
* Messaging (MQ, Kafka, REST API, ...)
* Front-end (Angular)
* Test Driven Development (Unit testing in Spring Boot and Angular, in memory database testing using Mockito)
* Agile processes (Safe / Scrum / ADO) but also about backlog management, strategic planning, business relationship management, problem analysis and business modelling.
* Bonus points for having relevant experience using docker containers and orchestration with Kubernetes.


**Benefits**
**Who are we?**
 Expleo is a rapidly growing consulting company dedicated to delivering innovative solutions in the fields of AI engineering, digitalization, hyper-automation, cybersecurity, and data science. With a strong commitment to integrity, diversity, sustainability, and societal security, Expleo is at the forefront of creating a better future. Join our dynamic team and be part of our journey to shape the future of technology and business.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
* Collaborative working environment – we stand shoulder to shoulder with our clients and our peers through good times and challenges
* We empower all passionate technology loving professionals by allowing them to expand their skills and take part in inspiring projects
* Expleo Academy - enables you to acquire and develop the right skills by delivering a suite of accredited training courses
* Always working as one team, our people are not afraid to think big and challenge the status quo
* Collective agreement with the union
* Access to a collection of benefits and discounted prices on services and shops.
* Health benefits
* Expleo team activities


 "We are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons regardless of their race, sex, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation or age ”.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Description**
 Welcome to SSC – Swedish Space Corporation, the perfect workplace for those passionate about technology in general and space in particular.
   

  

 With space organizations, research institutes, institutional and commercial actors as customers, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications, space consulting services, rocket and balloon systems, flight test services, satellite propulsion systems, and much more.
   

  

 SSC also has one of the world’s largest global networks of ground stations for satellite communications. We own and operate the Esrange Space Center in Kiruna,
   

  

 northern Sweden, with the aim of launching satellites in the near future.
   

  

 Are you fueled by a passion for people and the ambition to create an awesome workplace?
   

  

 Are you ready to embark on an exciting journey with us to help Earth benefit from space?
   

  

 If you answer yes to these questions, we invite you to seize the opportunity to make a significant impact as a Software Engineer in our team. We are looking for a dedicated person who shares our core values of Customer passion, Care, Collaboration, Curiosity, and Courage.
   

  

**Requirements**
 YOUR ROLE
   

  

 At SSC Connect we enable global satellite communication, and you will be part of the Software unit that makes it happen.
   

  

 As our Software Engineer, you’ll develop and maintain the critical systems that keep our customers connected with their satellites every day.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Design, build andmaintainhigh-quality code for new and existing software applications powering SSC’s services.
* Improve automation for software testing,deploymentand delivery pipelines.
* Enhance system observability by developing solutions for monitoring,loggingand alerting.
* Contribute to the continuous improvement of our agile ways of working.
* Support live missions and ensure the operational reliability of our systems.


**Responsibilities**
 WHO YOU ARE
   

  

 You are someone who cares about your systems, your users and your colleagues.
   

  

 You have a creative yet structured mindset, and you’re motivated by solving complex problems and finding efficient solutions. You’re comfortable taking initiatives, working both independently and collaboratively, and you enjoy transforming ideas into robust and scalable solutions.
   

  

 We believe you have a BSc or similar degree in Computer Science or Engineering and several years of experience in software development.
   

  

 To succeed in this role, you should have:
   

  

* Solid knowledge of Linux environments.
* Proven experience in C++.
* Excellent communication skills in English.


 We also value if you have:
   

  

* Experience in Python and/or Go.
* Experience with Docker.
* Experience building scalable and reliable infrastructure on cloud platforms.
* Experience with message bus technologies.
* Experience with databases (SQL).
* Interest or experience within the space industry.


 Additional information:
   

  

 Due to the high security classification of this role, EU citizenship is required and a background check will be conducted prior to employment.
   

  

 This role is critical to our operational services and may include participation in an on-call rotation (up to one week per month).
   

  

**Benefits**
 LOCATION
   

  

 This is a full time, permanent position based in Solna or Kiruna, with a hybrid work model requiring three days per week at the office.
   

  

 WE OFFER YOU
   

  

* A unique opportunity to contribute to a wide range of projects and play an active role in both the Swedish and international space industry.
* An excellent opportunity for personal and career development.
* An exciting, international workplace characterized by an open atmosphere and proud employees all over the world.


**Additional Benefits**
* In addition to vacation and traditional public holidays, we offer extra paid leave throughout the year, such as time off between Christmas and New Year, Ascension Day, amounting to 6-11 extra days depending on the calendar.
* Wellness allowance of SEK 5,000 per year.
* Health benefits such as voluntary health insurance and regular health checks for eligible employees.
* Access to a benefit bike through a tax-efficient leasing program.
* Support for employee-driven activities that promote connection, health, and culture across teams.
* Collective Agreement, including good pensions plans, parental pay and insurance.


 FURTHER INFORMATION
   

  

 For questions regarding employment terms or union-related matters, you are welcome to contact our union representatives:
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer: SverigesIngenjorer-AF@sscspace.com
   

  

 Unionen: unionen@sscspace.com
   

  

  

  

 NEXT STEP
   

  

 If this opportunity sparks your interest, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible! We review applications continuously and will conduct interviews throughout the process.
   

  

 You can submit your application up until 2026-05-31, which is the latest possible date for consideration.
   

  

 When applying, please include your CV. While you are welcome to include a brief personal note or letter, our evaluation will primarily focus on your skills and qualifications as outlined in your CV, ensuring a fair and unbiased recruitment process.
   

  

 WE HELP EARTH BENEFIT FROM SPACE
   

  

 Swedish Space Corporation (SSC) is a leading global provider of advanced space services, with more than 50 years of experience. We help space organizations, research institutes, commercial and institutional actors from all over the world to get access to space.
   

  

 With local presence on all continents and about 700 committed employees, we offer specialist expertise in satellite communications and satellite control services, spacecraft operations, rocket and balloon systems, launch services and flight test services, as well as engineering, operations and consultancy services for space missions.
   

  

 We help Earth benefit from Space. Learn more at sscspace.com

title: Java Developer – Naval & Defence Systems
description:
We are looking for a Java Developer with a background in or strong affinity for naval and defence environments. This is a role for someone who combines solid software engineering skills with an understanding of the operational and security demands that come with working in mission-critical defence contexts.
 



  





 Responsibilities
 


* Design, develop and maintain Java-based applications within naval or defence systems
* Contribute to architecture decisions and technical design in cross-functional teams
* Write well-structured, secure and maintainable code
* Perform code reviews, unit testing and support integration and system testing
* Collaborate with systems engineers, testers and stakeholders across the programme
* Ensure compliance with applicable security, quality and documentation requirements
* Contribute to continuous improvement of development processes and tooling



  





 Qualifications
 


* Proven experience as a Java Developer in complex technical environments
* Background in or strong familiarity with naval, maritime or defence systems
* Solid understanding of software architecture, design patterns and secure coding practices
* Experience working in cross-functional teams with multiple stakeholders
* Comfortable with agile development methodologies
* Fluency in English and Swedish



  





 Meritorious Experience
 


* Experience with command and control (C2) or combat management systems
* Familiarity with naval communication protocols or data link standards (e.g. Link 16, NMEA)
* Knowledge of cybersecurity principles and defence-grade security requirements
* Experience with middleware, messaging frameworks or distributed systems in defence contexts
* Security clearance or prior experience working within classified programmes
* Background in Swedish, French or NATO naval environments



  





**About Astek Sweden** 




 Astek is built on curiosity, technical passion and a commitment to innovation. This drives our approach to product development, long-term partnerships, and the value we create every day. At Astek, you will work alongside some of the industry's most skilled engineers in an environment that encourages growth, collaboration and technical excellence.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 At Astek, people and innovation come first. You can expect:
 


* Challenging and meaningful assignments in advanced technology domains
* A strong focus on professional development and career growth
* A supportive and welcoming engineering culture
* Attractive benefits, including 5,000 SEK in wellness allowance



  





 We welcome applicants from all backgrounds.
 



**Want to Be Part of Our Team?** 




 We warmly welcome your application! Recruitment is ongoing — apply as soon as you can.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
Svea Solar is on the verge of transforming how we manage energy with just the click of a button. We're here to help our customers make the most of their energy usage while also balancing the energy grid with smart, innovative solutions. To bring this vision to life, we're expanding our engineering team and are on the lookout for our next Backend Engineer.
   

  

**About The Role & The Team**
 As a Backend Engineer, you'll join our Sunbeam Labs, where we’re creating digital services that range from energy optimization to virtual power plants. You’ll work closely with a talented and energetic team of engineers and domain experts, all focused on building cutting-edge software solutions that make energy optimization a reality for our customers.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll be involved in every stage of the software development lifecycle, from brainstorming ideas to deployment and ongoing maintenance. Since we’re pioneering services that haven’t existed before, there’s plenty of room for discovery and problem-solving! You’ll be working with thousands of connected devices that we control in real-time, based on measurements taken multiple times per second. Your daily challenges might include figuring out how to distribute work among devices, handling AWS datacenter failovers without a hitch, counting milliseconds and megawatts, and even predicting tomorrow’s sunshine.
   

  

 If you love tackling challenges, writing code, and having fun while doing it, this could be the
   

  

 perfect fit for you!
   

  

 🌍 Life as a Power Shifter - What do we offer you
   

  

**The opportunity to make an impact** 
 – your work directly contributes to fixing the planet and driving the energy transition.
   

  

**About**
**A value-driven workplace** 
 – read more about our values here.
   

  

**The chance to own your results** 
 – grow, take responsibility, and power up as both we and the energy industry evolve.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusivity** 
 – different perspectives drive innovation. Here, you can be yourself and contribute with your experiences, identities, and ideas.
   

  

**Employment benefits** 
 – occupational pension, 30 days of vacation, wellness allowance, parking, and more.
   

  

**Flexibility / hybrid work** 
 – work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

 Want to see what life at Svea Solar really looks like? Follow us on Instagram: @LifeAtSveaSolar
   

  

 Are we a match?
   

  

 At Svea Solar, we’re all about our values, and we want to make sure they resonate with you too. We’re looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who’s not just experienced, but who’s also passionate about end-to-end development. You should be comfortable with architecture styles and APIs (like REST or RPC) and have strong communication skills with a proactive attitude.
   

  

**Here’s what we’re looking for:**
* You value team success over personal success.
* 10+ years of experience as a backend developer, preferably with .NET and C#
* A solid understanding of architecture styles and APIs
* Great communication skills


**Bonus points if you have:**
* Knowledge of cloud technologies (we use AWS)
* Experience in the energy sector
* Experience with Kubernetes and Docker
* Experience with time series databases
* Experience working with physical devices


**We are a hybrid team that meets at our office in Alvik Strand 3 times a week.**
 If this sounds like you, we’d love to meet you! Join us on our mission to revolutionize home energy solutions and create a greener, more sustainable future.
   

  

 ⚡Who are we
   

  

 As Sweden’s - and one of Europe’s - leading providers of energy tech and solar, we help our customers optimize their energy use with smart, connected solutions. From solar panels to heat pumps, batteries, EV chargers, and software, we’re shaping the future of energy. We call it
 **The Power Shift** 
 . And the ones driving it?
 **Power Shifters** 
 .
   

  

  

  

**About Our Recruitment Process**
* With structured interviews and assessments through Alva Labs, we make sure our recruitment process is fair, inclusive, and unbiased - because diversity is key to innovation!
* Read more about our Recruitment process here.


 👉
 **Ready to become a Power Shifter?** 
 We review applications on a rolling basis, so don’t wait to send yours in!

title: AI Engineer
description:
At Umain, we're not just creating software; we're crafting the future, one innovative project at a time. With our motto "Shape, Ship, Scale," we empower our team to not only envision the future but also play a pivotal role in building it. We're a dynamic team where you can shape the future, ship groundbreaking solutions, and scale your abilities in many different ways.
   

  

 We're on the lookout for developers ready to join us in this journey, bringing passion, creativity, and dedication along with them. The role is ideal for engineers with demonstrable skills in AI as well as for software engineers who have recently transitioned to AI and ML expertise, and offers an opportunity to develop your craft whilst working closely with clients on delivering AI solutions to real-world challenges.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking an AI Engineer with a strong intuition for AI and a genuine enthusiasm in building robust, scalable solutions to power innovative digital experiences. The ideal candidate combines technical expertise with a deep enthusiasm for advancing AI capabilities.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A chance to work closely with global brands on a range of diverse and unique projects that explore and truly push the boundaries of what's possible.
* A fun and fair work environment where you have the opportunity to expand your skills through unique challenges and fantastic colleagues.
* A personal coach, and a setting where you can grow professionally and personally.
* Being part of multidisciplinary teams, participating in agile teams, being an important player in a highly ambitious setting.


 As an AI Engineer at Umain, your role will involve:
   

  

* Assisting our clients in clarifying their questions and determining if using AI is a suitable solution for them
* You understand the limitations of a model and how to address them within the product’s UX
* Implementing AI-as-a-Service (e.g., OpenAI, Claude LLMs) in projects; you assess when these services are a good option and understand any potential limitations
* Being familiar with pre-trained models and available datasets and the ability to apply them if existing AI services fall short for the use case at hand
* Validating, deploying, monitoring, and maintaining built models, ensuring they can be used at scale
* Developing and maintaining end-to-end data pipelines and machine learning workflows, optimizing for performance and reliability
* Working with diverse, cross-functional teams on projects that deliver groundbreaking AI solutions for global brands


 It’s a plus (not a requirement) if you have additional experience in:
   

  

* PyTorch, Tensorflow
* Transfer learning, few-shot learning, PEFT and LoRa
* Multi-modal transformer models, RLHF


 Who You Are
   

  

**We Value Candidates Who Demonstrate**
* Great delivery skills: Proven capability to deliver AI solutions
* Strong AI intuition: A deep understanding of AI concepts
* Curiosity: Enthusiasm for emerging technologies, creativity in problem-solving, and an eagerness to learn in a rapidly evolving AI landscape
* You're a developer with a passion for innovation and a knack for problem-solving.
* You're eager to learn, grow, and take on new challenges.
* You value collaboration, diversity, and the opportunity to make a significant impact.
* You believe in the power of technology to shape the future.


**Why Umain?**
**Career Framework** 
 : We believe in fairness and clarity, which is why we've established a transparent career framework to ensure equal pay and equal opportunities for all. Your growth and success are as important to us as they are to you. Together with your coach, you will build your own development plan and grow in your career.
   

  

**Work-Life Balance** 
 : At Umain, diversity is our strength. We understand that life doesn’t pause when you walk into the office. That's why we've cultivated an environment that supports an excellent work-life balance. We welcome team members from all walks of life, recognizing the richness that different backgrounds, ages, and life stages bring to our team. We're committed to supporting each other, encouraging a healthy work-life balance that respects your needs, whether it's taking care of your family, your pets, or yourself.
   

  

**Innovations and Learning** 
 : Technology is always evolving, bringing new challenges and opportunities for collaboration and learning. Our developers work closely with designers, analysts, testers and more to tackle these challenges head-on, sharing knowledge and growing together.
   

  

**Skills Over Degrees** 
 : We’re more interested in what you can do than in the diplomas you hold. Talent, drive, and creativity are what count at Umain. Here, you’ll find opportunities to grow, learn, and excel in your career, regardless of your educational background. If you have the ambition and commitment to succeed, we have the environment and resources to support your journey.
   

  

**Are you ready to SHAPE, SHIP, and SCALE with us?**
 If you're a developer who thrives on innovation, values a supportive and inclusive workplace, and is eager to make a tangible impact on the future, we’d love to hear from you. Let’s build something awesome together.
   

  

***Background check***
*Umain conducts a background check for final candidates in accordance with our* 
 internal policies
 *. The check is carried out only with your consent and is ordered by our CISO through our approved screening partner. The scope of the check depends on the role level. This step is performed late in the recruitment process and is used solely to support a secure and fact‑based hiring decision.*
 Umain is a digital product consultancy. We shape, ship and scale digital products at speed. Founded in Stockholm in 2001, we are a growing team of 100+ experts in digital product strategy, design, and technology.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Software Engineer - iOS
description:
**Why join us?**
 We’re on a mission to empower people with disabilities to do what they once did or never thought possible. As the world-leader in assistive communication solutions, we empower our customers to express themselves, connect with the world, and live richer lives.
   

  

 At Tobii Dynavox, you can grow your career within a dynamic, global company that has a clear, impactful purpose - with the flexibility to also do what truly matters to you outside of work. What’s more, you’ll be part of a work culture where collaboration is the norm and individuality is welcomed.
   

  

 As a member of our team, you’ll have the power to innovate for good. You’ll see your ideas in use in new applications, work with the latest technology on leading platforms, and deliver meaningful solutions for our customers.
   

  

**About the Role:**
*We’re at an exciting stage in our journey—growing rapidly and expanding our Product & Development team in Stockholm to build a vibrant hub for innovation, product design, and technology. This is a unique opportunity to join a thriving organization where you can help shape the future of assistive communication, defining how we work and delivering impactful solutions for our users.*
*We are building a culture of empowered, collaborative teams who are passionate about helping individuals with disabilities find their voice and connect with the world. Our teams thrive on trust, collaboration, and a positive environment where everyone lead and contributes. We deeply understand the people we serve, empathize with their challenges, and use our expertise to make a real difference.*
 As a
 **Software Engineer – iOS** 
 you will join a cross-functional team that develops innovative mobile and desktop applications aimed at improving assistive communication. While your strong iOS background will be key in strengthening this area of the team, you will also contribute more broadly across our platforms and technologies. This is a role for someone who enjoys solving real-world problems through software and is motivated by building tools that make a difference in people’s lives.
   

  

 In this role, you will work with:
   

  

* Develop and maintain high-quality software across mobile and desktop platforms
* Contribute to the architecture and design of both current and upcoming products
* Bring iOS expertise to the team and help guide best practices in mobile development
* Write clean, efficient, and testable code
* Debug and troubleshoot issues across the stack
* Collaborate with developers, designers, and product managers in an agile environment
* Stay informed on relevant technologies and help evaluate new tools and approaches
* Support and contribute to CI/CD pipelines and testing efforts


**What We're Looking For:**
 We’re looking for someone who thrives in a collaborative environment and enjoys working closely with others to solve problems. You’re someone who communicates clearly, is open to learning, and can adapt comfortably as things evolve. Curiosity, a proactive mindset, and a supportive attitude are traits that help you succeed, not just in delivering high-quality code, but also in contributing to a healthy and effective team dynamic.
   

  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science or related field
* 4+ years of professional experience in iOS development
* Solid understanding of Swift, SwiftUI, Objective-C, and the Apple ecosystem
* Experience working with iOS frameworks, APIs, and the App Store submission process
* Ability to guide others in mobile best practices and contribute to shared mobile architecture
* Broader software engineering experience, ideally including desktop or cross-platform development
* Experience with or openness to working in .NET/C# environments
* Familiarity with Xamarin and/or MAUI is a plus
* Comfortable working with CI/CD workflows, automated testing, and agile methodologies
* Strong problem-solving skills and a collaborative mindset


 Apply today!
   

  

 We believe in empowering individuals - including our own employees - to reach their full potential. So, if you want to change lives while growing your own career, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Ada Developer
description:
We are looking for an experienced Ada Developer to join assignments within safety-critical and defence domains. This is a technically demanding role where software reliability, standards compliance and engineering rigour are non-negotiable. You will contribute to the development and maintenance of mission-critical systems built to the highest quality and safety standards.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Develop, integrate and maintain software in Ada for safety-critical or defence systems
* Write clean, traceable and standards-compliant code in accordance with applicable guidelines
* Perform unit testing, code reviews and static analysis
* Collaborate with systems and verification engineers across the full development lifecycle
* Contribute to documentation, configuration management and quality processes
* Support integration activities and troubleshoot complex technical issues



  





**Qualifications** 



* Proven experience developing software in Ada (Ada 83, Ada 95, Ada 2005 or Ada 2012)
* Background in safety-critical, defence, avionics or embedded systems environments
* Strong understanding of real-time and resource-constrained software development
* Experience with software verification, testing and lifecycle documentation
* Analytical mindset with high attention to detail and code quality
* Fluency in English



  





**Meritorious Experience** 



* Familiarity with DO-178C, DEF STAN 00-55 or similar safety and defence standards
* Experience with SPARK Ada for formal verification
* Knowledge of RTOS environments and low-level hardware interfaces
* Experience working within classified or regulated defence programmes
* Background in radar, navigation, communication or weapon systems software



  





**About Astek Sweden** 




 Astek is built on curiosity, technical passion and a commitment to innovation. This drives our approach to product development, long-term partnerships, and the value we create every day. At Astek, you will work alongside some of the industry's most skilled engineers in an environment that encourages growth, collaboration and technical excellence.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 At Astek, people and innovation come first. You can expect:
 


* Challenging and meaningful assignments in advanced technology domains
* A strong focus on professional development and career growth
* A supportive and welcoming engineering culture
* Attractive benefits, including 5,000 SEK in wellness allowance



  





 We welcome applicants from all backgrounds.
 



**Want to Be Part of Our Team?** 




 We warmly welcome your application! Recruitment is ongoing — apply as soon as you can.

title: Integration Developer
description:
**INTEGRATION DEVELOPER**
 Would you like to work in an international environment where you’ll make a difference every day? At Permobil, we’re looking for game-changers to join us as we innovate for individuals and develop the world’s most advanced assistive solutions.
   

  

 At
 **Permobil** 
 , the people who use our products come first. Our purpose is to create advanced assistive solutions that make the lives of adults and children living with disabilities more enriching. Our people are passionate about pushing the boundaries of technology to deliver innovations that improve lives. We are a sustainable and responsible business committed to continuous improvement, and our customers can trust us to provide market-leading solutions driven by insights-based clinical data.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 As an
 **Integration Developer** 
 at Permobil, you will serve as the vital link between our business systems and the AI platform. You will design and maintain secure, scalable connectors that integrate our large language model (LLM) services with key tools such as Dynamics 365, SharePoint Online, Teams, Fabric, and Power Platform, enabling truly actionable AI across the organization. If you thrive on solving complex data and API challenges within Microsoft’s cloud ecosystem, this role places you at the heart of innovation and digital transformation.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and build robust integrations between Azure AI services and enterprise systems (CRM, HR, ERP, IoT),
* Create reusable APIs, plugins, and Power Automate connectors to let agents execute business workflows,
* Develop logic apps, webhooks, and middleware using Azure Functions, API Management, and Service Bus,
* Implement secure data access using Managed Identities, Entra ID, and role-based access control,
* Monitor integration performance with Azure Monitor, Application Insights, and Log Analytics,
* Work closely with Python and UX teams to expose function-calling endpoints for AI functions.


**Qualifications & Skills**
* Master/Bachelor Degree in Computer Science or similar education,
* 4+ years of experience with Azure integration services (API Management, Logic Apps, Functions, Service Bus),
* Proficiency in C#, Python, or Node.js for backend/middleware development,
* Hands-on experience with Microsoft Graph API, Dynamics 365 APIs, or SharePoint REST APIs,
* Familiarity with Power Platform (Power Automate, Power Apps) for workflow automation,
* Solid understanding of REST / GraphQL API standards, authentication, and data security,
* Experience in enterprise system integration and change management,
* Experience in agile methodologies,
* Fluent in English; proficiency in Swedish is a plus.


**Meriting Skills**
* Experience with LangChain Tool Calling or OpenAI function calling patterns,
* Knowledge of event-driven architectures and Event Grid,
* Familiarity with Azure DevOps Pipelines and GitOps workflows.


**Who are you?**
 You inspire and motivate those around you, building strong collaboration and clear communication with stakeholders at every level. You actively encourage experimentation, viewing each new attempt as an opportunity for growth. You understand that failure is a stepping stone to success, helping to create an environment where curiosity, learning, and innovation are always encouraged.
   

  

**Why is Permobil the next step for you?**
* You’ll make a difference. Every day. Everything we do leads to understanding and improving the lives of our users. Through our evidence-based innovation, we make a difference to people’s lives.
* You’ll make your mark as part of our future. We collaborate with colleagues across borders to Innovate for Individuals. The impact you make personally could lead change around the world.
* You’ll feel welcome from day one. We’re known for being great colleagues, who are collaborative, fun and at the cutting-edge. Everyone at Permobil cares as much as you do about making a positive difference.


**Application Process**
 We will conduct selection continuously so send us your application today or before
 **December 5th** 
 at the latest!
   

  

 Permobil is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion. We welcome applications from all qualified individuals.
   

  

 For more information about the position, please contact Christoffer Stigson, Director Digital Transformation, christoffer.stigson@permobil.com
   

  

 For information about the recruitment process, please contact Zivile Mitkute, Talent Acquisition Partner, zivile.mitkute@permobil.com
   

  

**Please respect that we do not wish recruitment assistance or advertising, we decline calls from recruitment and advertising providers.**
**More About Permobil**
 Permobil founder Dr. Per Uddén believed that helping people achieve the greatest level of independence is a basic human right and, for over 50 years, Permobil has held fast to that belief. Permobil is a global leader in advanced rehabilitation technology, passionate about better understanding our users’ needs and improving their quality of life through state-of-the-art healthcare solutions. Today, those solutions include power wheelchairs, seating and positioning products, power assist, and manual wheelchairs.
   

  

 Permobil is part of Patricia Industries, a subsidiary of Investor AB, and is headquartered in Sweden. Permobil has 2 000 team members in 18 countries around the world. For more information regarding the company’s storied history and complete product line, visit permobil.com.

title: Södersjukhuset söker BI-Utvecklare
description:
**Tjänsten som BI-utvecklare är placerad på Produktionsenheten är en stabsfunktion inom Produktion och Utveckling och gruppen består idag av 6 personer som arbetar nära vårdverksamheter och vårdstödjande funktioner.**




**Vi söker dig som vill vara med och driva BI-utvecklingen vid Södersjukhuset!**




 - Arbetar du idag som Dataanalytiker/Data Analyst, BI-utvecklare eller inom en liknande roll och söker nya utmaningar? Då kan denna tjänst vara något för dig!
   

  





****Arbetsbeskrivning****




 Enhetens uppdrag är att utveckla och förvalta modeller för produktion- och kapacitetsplanering, uppföljning och informationsförsörjning inom sjukvårdsproduktion. Vi arbetar både med strategiska, taktiska och operativa frågor på sjukhusövergripande nivå – både genom att driva och utveckla datadrivna processer och som stöd i större projekt. Enheten ansvarar för förvaltning och utveckling av sjukhusets BI-stöd för ekonomi, HR-data och sjukvårdsproduktion. Idag har sjukhuset ett flertal BI system där framför allt QlikSense används i hög utsträckning.
   

  





 I rollen som BI-utvecklare ingår bland annat följande arbetsuppgifter:
 


* Hämta in, förbättra och göra data tillgänglig från olika källsystem, till exempel journalsystem, ekonomisystem och personaldatasystem
* Utveckla rapporter, visualiseringar och andra beslutsstöd som används både strategiskt av ledning och operativt av vårdpersonal
* Arbeta med informations- och begreppsmodellering, med fokus på utveckling i SQL Server och Qlik Sense



 Arbetet innebär både utveckling, analys och dialog med verksamheten, där du blir en viktig länk mellan data, teknik och verksamhetsbehov.
   

  





****Kvalifikationer****




 För att lyckas och trivas i rollen har du ett analytiskt och proaktivt tillvägagångssätt. Du är van att ta egna initiativ, där du drivs av nyfikenhet samt kan agera självständigt och affärsmässigt. Du utvecklas av att utforska, visualisera samt förstå samband i data.
   

  





 Du ha goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift. Vi välkomnar sökande med olika språkbakgrunder.
   

  





**Kompetenskrav:** 



* Du har relevant akademisk utbildning såsom systemutvecklare, civilingenjör eller liknande.
* Du har en gedigen erfarenhet från en roll som IT-utvecklare sedan tidigare.
* Erfarenhet som BI-utvecklare, systemutvecklare eller liknande.
* Kunskaper i SQL samt minst ett BI-verktyg, så som Qlik, Tableau, Power BI eller liknande



 Du kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska, både i tal och skrift.
   

  





**Meriterande:** 



* Erfarenhet att ta fram rapport – och analyslösningar tillsammans med användare.
* Erfarenhet av hälso- och sjukvård.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta som konsult.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med NPrinting.



**Erbjudande**




 Våra medarbetare är vår viktigaste resurs och därför månar vi om att du ska ha ett utvecklande, tryggt och hållbart arbetsliv. Vi erbjuder många olika förmåner och fördelar oavsett var du befinner dig i livet och i karriären. Några av dessa förmåner är:
 


* Vidareutbildning. Vi erbjuder regelbundna, kompetenshöjande aktiviteter utifrån medarbetarens och verksamhetens behov.
* Ett generöst friskvårdsbidrag
* Personalgym och hälsoteam med fysioterapeuter, ergonomer och hälsopedagoger som kan stötta dig i din träning.
* Föräldrapenningtillägg och föräldralön.



 Läs mer om vårt erbjudande här
   

  





**Övrigt**




 I denna rekrytering är det personliga brevet inte obligatoriskt. Vi använder oss av urvalsfrågor i ansökningsförfarandet för att kunna göra en rättvis och likvärdig bedömning av dig som kandidat. Notera att det tydligt ska framgå av ditt CV på vilket sätt du uppfyller våra ställda krav och meriter, då det tillsammans med urvalsfrågor ligger till grund för vårt urval.
   

  





 För att din ansökan ska anses som fullständig och kunna gå vidare i rekryteringsprocessen, behöver både din ansökan och ditt CV vara inskickade på svenska. Övriga dokument, såsom eventuella kursintyg, ska skickas in i originalutförande.
   

  





 I denna rekrytering arbetar vi med löpande urval och intervjuer.
   

  





 I denna tjänst kan det bli aktuellt med provanställning. 
   

  





**Välkommen med din ansökan!**




 När du söker jobb hos Region Stockholm behandlar vi personuppgifter som du lämnar i din ansökan, exempelvis kontaktuppgifter, CV och andra relevanta dokument. Uppgifterna används för att kunna hantera rekryteringsprocessen och bedöma din ansökan.
   

  





  

 Vi följer dataskyddsförordningen (GDPR) och har rutiner för att skydda dina uppgifter. I vissa fall kan personuppgifter komma att behandlas i tredje land (utanför EU/EES), exempelvis om vi använder tjänsteleverantörer med system eller servrar placerade där. Vid sådan behandling säkerställer vi att lämpliga skyddsåtgärder finns, till exempel genom standardavtalsklausuler eller andra godkända mekanismer.
   

  





  

 Mer information om hur vi behandlar personuppgifter och dina rättigheter hittar du i vår integritetspolicy.
   

  





  

 Södersjukhuset är ett av Nordens största akutsjukhus, vi finns i hjärtat av samhället, dag som natt för våra patienter. Hos oss står akutsjukvården i centrum och utgör tillsammans med de stora folksjukdomarna vår specialitet. Vi bedriver omfattande klinisk forskning och utbildning, för oss är det viktigt att kombinera det stora sjukhusets möjligheter med den nära och personliga patientkontakten. På Södersjukhuset är alla en del i en större helhet där vi tillsammans skapar morgondagens vård.
   

  





****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Software Architect / Tech Lead
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Vill du kombinera arkitektur med hands-on utveckling - och samtidigt påverka ett system som används av en stor del av Sveriges kommuner?
   

  

 Vi söker en Software Architect / Tech Lead som vill arbeta nära utvecklingsteamen och vara med och driva moderniseringen av Treserva.
   

  

**Vad du får hos oss:**
 ✅ En roll där du både sätter teknisk riktning och arbetar hands-on
   

  

 ✅ Möjlighet att påverka arkitekturen i ett system som används i hela Sverige
   

  

 ✅ Arbeta nära teamen och se direkt effekt av dina beslut
   

  

 ✅ Vara med och driva en modernisering från legacy till modern arkitektur
   

  

 ✅ Arbeta i en tekniskt komplex miljö med höga krav och verklig påverkan
   

  

**Placeringsort: Stockholm, Göteborg eller Malmö, andra orter kan också vara möjliga.**
 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Som mjukvaruarkitekt kommer du att ha en central roll i att driva både teknisk riktning och konkret implementation.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära utvecklingsteamen och fungerar som ett tekniskt stöd i vardagen, samtidigt som du bidrar till den långsiktiga arkitekturen.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Stötta utvecklingsteam i dagliga tekniska beslut och implementation
* Coacha team i att lösa komplexa tekniska problem
* Arbeta med arkitektur och design av nya moduler och lösningar
* Driva och strukturera den tekniska roadmapen för Treserva tillsammans med ansvarig chef
* Ta fram konkreta software design proposals för nya lösningar och funktioner
* Vara en aktiv del i (och på sikt leda) Architecture Board
* Identifiera teknisk skuld och driva förbättringar
* Bidra i modernisering av legacy till en mer löst kopplad arkitektur


**Så arbetar du i rollen**
 Du arbetar nära våra utvecklingsteam och växlar mellan att diskutera övergripande arkitektur, gå ner i tekniska detaljer och stötta utvecklare i konkreta problem.
   

  

 Du är ett tekniskt bollplank i vardagen - inte en arkitekt på distans. Detta är inte en renodlad strategisk arkitektroll. Det är en tekniskt operativ roll där du arbetar nära utvecklingsteam.
   

  

 Det är heller inte en ren utvecklarroll - utan en kombination av arkitekturansvar och tekniskt ledarskap.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du:
   

  

* Har erfarenhet av .NET och moderna webbapplikationer
* Har arbetat med mikrotjänster och distribuerade system
* Har tagit tekniska designbeslut och stöttat utvecklingsteam
* Trivs i en roll nära utveckling där du kombinerar arkitektur och hands-on


 Meriterande:
   

  

* Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD
* Angular eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av modernisering av legacy-system


**To applicants: please note that this position requires Swedish language skills on a professional level, verbally as well as in writing.**
**Om Treserva**
 Treserva är ett verksamhetssystem som möjliggör för kommunal vård och socialtjänst att arbeta rättssäkert, processtyrt och digitalt.
   

  

 Vi står inför en spännande utvecklingsfas där vi:
   

  

* Moderniserar befintlig arkitektur
* Utökar integrationer med myndigheter och nationella tjänster
* Utvecklar e-tjänster direkt mot medborgare
* Effektiviserar med automation och AI-lösningar


 Du blir en nyckelperson i att realisera dessa initiativ tillsammans med våra team.
   

  

 För mer information eller frågor, kontakta gärna: Abhijeet Singh på abhijee.singh@cgi.com.
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Lead Frontend Developer till Kleer
description:
Är du en erfaren frontendutvecklare som vill ta ett tekniskt ledarskap och sätta riktningen för hur moderna webbapplikationer byggs? Brinner du för utvecklarupplevelse, arkitektur och samarbete över hela stacken? Vill du dessutom jobba i ett stabilt produktbolag där tekniska beslut verkligen spelar roll?
   

  

 Då kan du vara vår nästa
 **Frontend Lead** 
 på Kleer.
   

  

 👉🏼 Om teamet och rollen
   

  

 Som Frontend Lead blir du en nyckelperson i vår utvecklingsorganisation. Du ansvarar för att sätta riktning för vår frontendarkitektur och säkerställa att våra applikationer är robusta, skalbara och trevliga att både använda och vidareutveckla.
   

  

 Du jobbar nära andra seniora utvecklare och produktteam och är en naturlig brygga mellan frontend och backend. Vår backend är huvudsakligen byggd i
 **Java** 
 , och vi ser därför att du har förståelse för hela stacken – även om ditt hjärta klappar lite extra för frontend.
   

  

 Dina ansvarsområden som Frontend Lead
   

  

* Sätta och vidareutveckla frontendarkitektur, mönster och best practices
* Ta tekniskt ledarskap inom frontend och stötta andra utvecklare i vardagen
* Säkerställa hög kvalitet i kodbas, prestanda och användarupplevelse
* Arbeta med och vidareutveckla vårt moderna frontend-stack
* Samarbeta tätt med backendutvecklare för välfungerande API:er och flöden
* Driva tekniska förbättringar i linje med vår målarkitektur
* Vara en stark röst i tekniska diskussioner och framtida teknikval


 AI som en naturlig del av utvecklarvardagen
   

  

 På Kleer Ser Vi AI Som Ett Självklart Stöd i Utvecklingsarbetet. Vi Söker Dig Som Är Nyfiken Och Positiv Till Att Använda AI För Att Till Exempel
   

  

* effektivisera kodning, testning och refaktorering
* skapa tydligare dokumentation och snabbare onboarding
* få stöd i designbeslut, felsökning och arkitekturresonemang
* automatisera repetitiva uppgifter


 Du behöver inte vara expert – men du gillar att utforska och använda verktyg som gör dig och teamet bättre.
   

  

 Vem är du?
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har flera års erfarenhet av modern frontendutveckling och har tagit ett tydligt tekniskt ansvar tidigare, formellt eller informellt. Du är trygg i arkitekturfrågor och gillar att hjälpa andra att växa.
   

  

**Vi Tror Att Du Har**
* Djup erfarenhet av React i större applikationer
* God kunskap inom Node.js och frontendnära backend
* Erfarenhet av TanStack Router, TanStack Query och tRPC (eller liknande tekniker)
* Förståelse för hela stacken och hur frontend samspelar med backend (Java)
* Ett starkt intresse för kodkvalitet, DX och långsiktighet


 Varför välja Kleer?
   

  

 💡
 **Teknisk påverkan** 
 – Du får stort inflytande över hur vi bygger vår frontend
   

  

 🚀
 **Innovation** 
 – Du får vara med och påverka teknikval och framtida arkitektur
   

  

 👥
 **Kultur & samarbete** 
 – Ett engagerat team där vi värdesätter kunskapsdelning och personlig utveckling
   

  

 🏡
 **Flexibilitet** 
 – Vi arbetar huvudsakligen från kontoret och ser stort värde i nära samarbete. Rollen innebär tre dagar i veckan på kontoret och två dagar med möjlighet att arbeta på distans.
   

  

 Låter det här som nästa steg för dig? Hör av dig så berättar vi mer! 🚀
   

  

*Vi genomför bakgrundskontroller i slutskedet av våra rekryteringsprocesser.*
**Mer Om Kleer Som Bolag**
 Vi grundades 2011 och är ett modernt & värderingsstyrt produktbolag. I över 12 år har vi skapat innovation och hjälpt små & medelstora bolag att automatisera sin ekonomi. Vi har en väldigt stabil affärsmodell som bolag och växer organiskt, med sunda finanser - vilket bland annat har gjort oss till sexfaldiga DI Gaseller. I skrivande stund närmar vi oss 200 kollegor och finns med kontor i centrala Stockholm, Göteborg & Malmö.
   

  

 Kleer är ekonomi- och lönehantering för moderna SaaS- och konsultbolag. Vi kombinerar Sveriges mest automatiserade ekonomisystem med ett dedikerat ekonomiteam. Resultatet: finansiell kontroll i realtid, minimal administration och en ekonomi som driver affären – inte bara rapporterar om den.
   

  

 Vi har utsetts till DI Gasell sju gånger och är stolta över vår värderingsstyrda kultur som bygger på ansvar, glädje, nyfikenhet och prestigelöshet. Idag är vi cirka 200 medarbetare med kontor i centrala Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö.

title: Senior/Lead Developer – Dynamics 365 CE
description:
As of 2 September 2025, Vivicta, former Tietoevry Tech Services, now operates as a standalone company under our new brand. We’ve officially launched Vivicta, your trusted Nordic transformation partner, making everyday easier through technology. You can explore more about our brand and what we stand for at https://www.vivicta.com
   

  

 Ready to join us? Click ‘Apply’ and complete our short application form to get started. Prefer another option? Apply via LinkedIn to automatically populate your details using your profile.
   

  

 Vi söker en erfaren utvecklare till Vivicta, där du blir anställd som konsult och arbetar i långsiktiga uppdrag mot en mycket samhällsviktig kund! Rollen innebär avancerad utveckling i våra befintliga on‑premises‑baserade CRM‑system, men även i moderna molnplattformar inför en framtida migrering.
   

  

 Hos oss får du mer än bara ett uppdrag. Som utvecklare på Vivicta blir du en del av ett team som kombinerar hög teknisk kompetens, stor påverkan i samhällsviktiga projekt och en prestigelös kultur där vi alltid stöttar varandra.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära våra kunder och får möjlighet att bidra till lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för medborgare samtidigt som du utvecklas tekniskt inom både on‑premises och moderna molnplattformar.
   

  

**När du börjar hos på Vivicta som Lead/Senior utvecklare inom Dynamics 365 kommer du att**
* Utveckla och vidareutveckla Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Service i on‑premises‑miljöer.
* Lösa komplexa tekniska problem med stor verksamhetspåverkan.
* Samarbeta proaktivt med verksamhet genom hela utvecklingsprocessen.
* Prioritera krav tillsammans med kund och bidra till tekniska vägval.
* Leda och stötta team i tekniska frågor.


**Vem vi söker**
* Du har mycket god kompetens inom on‑premises‑utveckling (Dynamics 365 / CRM).
* Erfarenhet av integrations- och systemutveckling i lokala servermiljöer (ej molnberoende).
* Förmåga att utveckla i molnbaserade lösningar (Power Platform / Dynamics 365 Online) inför kommande migreringar.
* Du är självgående, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad.
* Du är flytande i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet från kommunal eller statlig verksamhet.
* Erfarenhet av att leda eller koordinera utvecklingsteam.


**Blev du inspirerad?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Bifoga ditt CV eller LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmanar dig att söka redan idag. Om du har några frågor angående denna roll, vänligen kontakta anställande chef, Linda Tärnström, linda.tarnstrom@vivicta.com.
   

  

 Hoppas vi hörs snart!

title: Tech Lead, Android Core Product - Stockholm, Sweden
description:
The mission of Speechify is to make sure that reading is never a barrier to learning.



Over 50 million people use Speechify's text-to-speech products to turn whatever they're reading – PDFs, books, Google Docs, news articles, websites – into audio, so they can read faster, read more, and remember more. Speechify's text-to-speech reading products include its iOS app, Android App, Mac App, Chrome Extension, and Web App. Google recently named Speechify the Chrome Extension of the Year and Apple named Speechify its Design award winner for inclusivity for 2025.



Today, nearly 200 people around the globe work on Speechify in a 100% distributed setting – Speechify has no office. These include frontend and backend engineers, AI research scientists, and others from Amazon, Microsoft, and Google, leading PhD programs like Stanford, high growth startups like Stripe, Vercel, Bolt, and many founders of their own companies.


**Overview**



With the growth of our Android app, being the most used text-to-speech app in the Play Store, we find the need for a Senior Android Engineer to help us support the new user base as well as work on new and exciting projects to push us forward.


This is a key role and ideal for someone who thinks strategically, enjoys fast-paced environments, passionate about making product decisions, and has experience building great user experiences that delight users.



We are a flat organization that allows anyone to become a leader by showing excellent technical skills and delivering results consistently and fast. Work ethic, solid communication skills, and obsession with winning are paramount.



Our interview process involves several technical interviews and we aim to complete them within 1 week.


**What Yo****u'****ll Do**


* Owning major features and working closely with our design team - take ownership of features inside the app and become responsible of delivering high quality features
* Shape the future of our Android team
* Own, maintain and improve reliability metrics for key features
* Participate in discussions across different teams - Product, Design, Engineering
* Review pull requests, and support other teammates
* Handle critical issues or cope with unexpected challenges
* Take ownership of feature releases and provide nightly builds for the QA team


**An Ideal Candidate Should Have**


* 5+ years of software engineering experience
* Familiarity with Android components
* Experience building or contributing to at least one Android app
* Product design intuition and user empathy
* Drive to push the boundaries of Android UI/UX
* Understanding of the importance of tests and how to approach writing tests
* Self-drive to improve the app and codebase above and beyond what's outlined in the spec
* Rock solid experience with Kotlin, Kotlin Coroutines, Kotlin Flow, Dagger 2, MVVM, Clean Architecture, Background Services, Music Player Service, Android Animations, Jetpack Navigation, JUnit tests
* Excellent communication skills
* User oriented problem solving approach
* Driven with continuous feedback from leaders


**Bonus:**


* Experience building, maintaining, or otherwise contributing to open source projects in Android
* Experience with iOS, Web or NodeJS


**Technologies we use:**


* Kotlin
* Kotlin Coroutines
* Kotlin Flow
* Jetpack Navigation
* Dagger 2
* Room
* Custom Views, Canvas & Paint
* Jetpack Compose
* JUnit


**What We offer**:


* A fast-growing environment where you can help shape the company and product.
* An entrepreneurial-minded team that supports risk, intuition, and hustle.
* A hands-off management approach so you can focus and do your best work.
* An opportunity to make a big impact in a transformative industry.
* Competitive salaries, a friendly and laid-back atmosphere, and a commitment to building a great asynchronous culture.
* Opportunity to work on a life-changing product that millions of people use.
* Build products that directly impact and support people with learning differences like dyslexia, ADD, low vision, concussions, autism, and more.
* Work in one of the fastest growing sectors of tech, the intersection of artificial intelligence and audio.


**Think you're a good fit for this job?**



Tell us more about yourself and why you're interested in the role when you apply.
  

And don't forget to include links to your portfolio and LinkedIn.


**Not looking but know someone who would make a great fit?**



Refer them!


**Speechify is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace.**



Speechify does not discriminate on the basis of race, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, disability, age, or other legally protected status.

title: UX Researcher
description:
**TL;DR –** 
 We’re looking for a curious, fast-moving UX Researcher to help shape the future of Lovable. You’ll uncover how users think, feel, and act, turning insights into product direction. You’ll design studies, test concepts, and experiment with new AI-assisted ways of learning from users, helping us move fast without compromising on craft.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
 We’re looking for a researcher who balances
 **curiosity and rigor** 
 — someone who loves asking
 *why* 
 , tests
 *how* 
 , and measures
 *what’s working* 
 . You’re as comfortable in a user interview as you are interpreting event data or survey results, and you know how to connect human stories with product metrics.
   

  

* 3–6 years of experience in UX research, human-centered design, or a related role.
* Proficiency in qualitative methods (interviews, usability testing, concept testing).
* Experience with survey design, data analysis, and working with behavioral data (e.g., from analytics tools) is a plus
* Strong synthesis skills, distilling findings into insights that influence design and product decisions.
* Excellent communication and storytelling skills to bring research to life for cross-functional teams.
* Comfortable in fast-paced, iterative environments with shifting priorities.
* Experience working closely with designers, PMs, and data scientists.


**What You’ll Do**
 In one sentence:
   

  

**Turn user insights into product direction that shapes how the world builds software.**
* Partner with product, design, growth and data teams to define learning goals for upcoming features and experiments.
* Explore new AI-driven approaches for recruiting, analysis, and synthesis — expanding how we learn from users.
* Conduct user sessions directly with Lovable users, gathering firsthand insights into behaviors, motivations, and unmet needs.
* Collaborate with data scientists to interpret behavioral data and validate qualitative findings.
* Contribute to building research frameworks, templates, and best practices for scalable discovery at Lovable.


**How We Hire**
* Fill out a short form and hop on a quick intro call with our recruiting team
* Meet designers and PMs to discuss your approach to research
* Walk through past work and real examples of your process
* Final conversations with product leadership


**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English — it’s our company language.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally, so please apply through our careers portal.

title: Creative Designer
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger—and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal in 2018—and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco—we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Creative Designer at Air Apps, you will play a crucial role in shaping our brand identity and delivering visually engaging designs across multiple platforms. You will collaborate with various teams to ensure a cohesive and compelling user experience, working on digital ads, social media content, landing pages, email campaigns, and print materials.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain a consistent visual identity that aligns with Air Apps’ brand guidelines.
* Create engaging graphics, illustrations, infographics, and layouts for web, social media, email campaigns, and print materials.
* Collaborate with Marketing, Product, and Content teams to translate requirements into compelling visual solutions.
* Iterate on designs based on feedback from stakeholders and refine assets using user insights and performance metrics.
* Ensure high-quality output and conduct design quality assurance across various channels.
* Utilize industry-standard design software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite, Figma) to create and deliver assets in multiple formats.


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Fine Arts, or a related field.
* Around 3 years of experience creating assets for digital marketing campaigns, social media, and web.
* Strong portfolio showcasing a range of design projects and styles.
* Knowledge of typography, color theory, layout, and design best practices.
* Proficiency in industry-standard design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and Figma.
* Strong communication, time-management, and attention-to-detail skills.
* Ability to work in a fast-paced, remote environment and collaborate effectively across teams.


**What benefits are we offering?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.
   

  

 Compensation Range: €44K - €55K

title: Head of Enterprise IT
description:
**Description**
---------------

**Head of Enterprise IT**

 ***At Icomera, we build technology that keeps people connected while*** ***they’re*** ***on the move. Every day, our solutions deliver fast, reliable internet and digital services on trains, trams, buses, and coaches - supporting millions of passengers across the world.***

***But connectivity is just the beginning. What we build helps public transport operators run safer, smarter, and more efficient services, and plays a real role in shaping the future of sustainable mobility. Our technology*** ***operates*** ***in complex, real***‑***world environments which means meaningful impact, interesting challenges, and solutions that are felt far beyond a screen.***

***If*** ***you’re*** ***motivated by technology that matters, used by real people every day,*** ***you’ll*** ***feel at home at Icomera.*** ***We*** ***connect*** ***the journey.***

 **Job type** Full-time


**Workplace conditions** Hybrid

**Location** Gothenburg, Sweden

 **About the** **Role****:**


As Head of Enterprise IT at Icomera, you will lead and develop the company’s Enterprise IT function in a global and technically complex environment. The role carries end‑to‑end responsibility for how Enterprise IT supports the business, both strategically and operationally.


You will be accountable for the IT landscape, processes, tools and delivery for approximately 300 users worldwide. A significant part of the delivery is managed in collaboration with our Parent company Equans IT-department, Equans IT, making stakeholder management and vendor governance central to the role.


You will operate across strategy, leadership and execution. You will play a key role in moving Enterprise IT towards a more structured, predictable and business‑oriented function. The role requires both a long‑term perspective and hands‑on involvement, with a strong focus on clarity, structure and change management. You will be a part in our Data and AI transformation journey, leading the team in best practices and new ways of working.


Beyond the core responsibilities, you act as a trusted partner to the business in IT‑related matters and contribute to long‑term planning together with the CIO whom you report to and other senior stakeholders.


You will be based at our Headquarters in Gothenburg, but the role involves international collaboration and periodic travel to Icomera offices and partners a few times per year.

 **Key responsibilities****:**

* Define and drive Icomera’s Enterprise IT strategy in alignment with business goals and group requirements
* Lead and develop the Enterprise IT team, including structure, ways of working and priorities
* Own and drive the Enterprise IT roadmap through the IT Board based on business needs
* Ensure stable and reliable IT operations and end‑user support globally, based on ITIL principles
* Establish and maintain IT processes related to quality, security and compliance, including ISO standards
* Own budget responsibility, cost control and resource planning within Enterprise IT
* Act as the primary interface towards Equans IT and other external suppliers
* Lead and follow up Enterprise IT projects and change initiatives
* Ensure clear communication around IT structures, processes and changes across the organisation

 **Re****quirements****:**

* Several years of experience in senior IT leadership roles within complex or international organisations
* Strong background in Enterprise IT and ITIL‑based operations
* Proven ability to drive structure, process improvement and organisational change
* Solid understanding of IT security, standards and compliance
* Experience with budget responsibility and vendor management
* Very good communication skills in English, spoken and written

 **The following skills we see as meritorious:**

* Experience working within or close to a group or corporate structure
* Exposure to multi‑site and international IT environments
* Knowledge of the Microsoft ecosystem and enterprise applications
* Understanding of Data and AI from a business perspective

 **Who You Are****:**


You are a confident and clear leader who combines structure with a pragmatic mindset. You build trust easily, take ownership in complex situations, and are comfortable leading through change.


You are communicative, accountable and business‑oriented, with the ability to translate technical topics into practical value for the organization. At the same time, you have sufficient technical understanding to challenge, prioritize and make sound decisions.

 **Our Offer:**

* Health is important – we offer a comprehensive health promotion package to our employees
* Flexible work arrangements – work from home for up to two days a week
* Electrical bike lease agreement via net salary deduction
* ITP Pension and collective bargaining agreement
* A social work environment – board game nights, after works, seasonal parties… The list goes on!

 ***Ready to be part of something exciting and make a real difference in the connected future of transport?*** ***We’d*** ***love to hear from you!***

 ***Practical details******:***


We will be reviewing applicants ongoing. Icomera welcomes candidates from all backgrounds, and we value a diverse and inclusive work environment.


We conduct reference checks and background checks as a standard procedure for all final candidates across all recruitment processes.


Icomera is an employer with a collective agreement with TechSverige. If you have questions to our local union representatives, you may contact them at unionen@icomera.com or saco@icomera.com.

 ***About Icomera:***


Icomera is the world’s leading provider of integrated connectivity solutions for trains, trams, buses, and coaches, serving millions of passengers and tens of thousands of vehicles on a daily basis. The IcoCrew now consist of 300+ employees globally. Icomera is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, with main offices in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, Germany, France, Ireland, and Italy.  

Icomera’s vision for green mobility within the public transport industry perfectly complements the wider mission of our parent company, Equans. As the global leader in multi-technical services with 74,000 employees working across 17 country hubs, Equans delivers customised solutions which connect, protect and energise territories, cities, buildings, industries and transport infrastructures, empowering their energy, industrial and digital transitions. Visit www.icomera.com for further information.
